title: L3 case file
description: YAML root sequence (JSON-compatible array) of row objects at dataset/{L1}/{L2}/{L3}.yaml. Row `input` / `expected` validate against `input.schema.json` and `expected.schema.json`.

id.description: Stable record id (UUID). Used to upsert by id. Omit to let Braintrust assign one.

label.description: Taxonomy segment beyond L3 (L4); merged with path into row tags on sync.

labels.description: Taxonomy segments L4+ when more than one level beyond the L3 file key.

input.description: The case input handed to the evaluation task (generated from mongodb-mcp-server eval types).

expected.description: The expected result / grading criteria for this case.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the case.

tags.description: Free-form tags categorizing the case (mirrors top-level tags when present).

scores.description: Names of scorer functions to apply to this case.

origin.description: Braintrust provenance info linking back to a source object.
